// ==== ordering/infrastructure/integration_event_dispatcher.py ====
# <auto-generated/>
from __future__ import annotations
from koine_infrastructure import IntegrationEventHandler, OutboxStore


class IntegrationEventDispatcher:
    """Drains the Ordering outbox and delivers each integration event to the handler in order."""

    def __init__(self, outbox: OutboxStore, handler: IntegrationEventHandler) -> None:
        self._outbox = outbox
        self._handler = handler

    async def dispatch_pending(self) -> None:
        for message in await self._outbox.unprocessed():
            await self._handler.handle(message)
            await self._outbox.mark_processed(message)

// ==== ordering/infrastructure/unit_of_work.py ====
# <auto-generated/>
from __future__ import annotations
from koine_infrastructure import InMemoryOutboxStore, OutboxMessage, OutboxStore
from ordering.infrastructure.order_repository_impl import OrderRepositoryImpl
from ordering.repositories.order_repository import OrderRepository


class UnitOfWork:
    """In-memory unit of work over the Ordering context's aggregate repositories."""

    orders: OrderRepository

    def __init__(
        self,
        orders: OrderRepository | None = None,
        outbox: OutboxStore | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.orders = orders if orders is not None else OrderRepositoryImpl()
        self._outbox: OutboxStore = outbox if outbox is not None else InMemoryOutboxStore()
        self._pending: list[object] = []

    def enqueue(self, integration_event: object) -> None:
        """Enqueues an integration event to be written to the outbox on the next save_changes."""
        self._pending.append(integration_event)

    async def save_changes(self) -> None:
        for integration_event in self._pending:
            await self._outbox.add(OutboxMessage.of(integration_event))
        self._pending.clear()
